The '''Freighter Type C''' was a medium-sized cargo freighter manufactured by [[Yuung, Tygg & Josse Engineering]].

This common light freighter was found throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and was YTJ Corporation's first attempt to satisfy the demand for an economical transport.

Unarmed and only lightly armored, the Type C was best deployed as part of a convoy for safety, as its top speed was far slower than even the most primitive [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
